subject: A blonde human soldier-captain in burnished armor stands at the front of a wedge formation of similarly armored soldiers, all hoisting tall spears or pikes skyward in unison
description: A young blonde human captain stands center-frame in gleaming plate armor with shoulder pauldrons, gripping a tall spear pointed upward. Behind her, ranks of identically armored soldiers fan out in a V-formation across an open field, every one of them raising their spears toward the sky in disciplined unison. Banners or pennants flutter from a few of the spear-shafts. The lighting is warm and clear — a bright daylit sky washes the scene in pale yellow-gold tones, and the armor catches the light in soft highlights. The mood is heroic, martial, unified — a captain leading her squad on the eve of action.
foreground: armored human captain with raised spear
background: ranks of armored soldiers in V-formation under an open daylit sky
emotion: resolute, determined, focused — chin lifted, eyes forward
